eyebrow.es: Breakout de alfabetización en IA generativa · Grado 3
eyebrow.vi: Breakout hiểu biết AI tạo sinh · Lớp 3
eyebrow.ar: تحدّي الثقافة في الذكاء الاصطناعي التوليدي · الصف 3
eyebrow.ur: جنریٹِو اے آئی خواندگی بریک آؤٹ · جماعت 3
eyebrow.zh: 生成式 AI 素养破解 · 3 年级

chrome.sub: AI is hiding in things you use every day. A voice helper, a video list, a photo app. Can you spot it? Crack four locks to find AI all around you.
chrome.briefP: AI is a computer tool that makes guesses. It shows up in many things you use each day. Read the clues, then open all four locks. Each lock has a reason that shows why the answer is right.
chrome.footerText: Gen AI Literacy Breakouts · Runs entirely in your browser — no logins, no data collected.
chrome.winP: You learned that AI is all around you in voice helpers, video lists, and photo apps. It makes guesses from patterns, it is a tool and not a person, and you are still the boss. Great spotting!

clues.title: AI you can talk to
clues.body: When you ask a voice assistant to play a song or tell the time, that is AI. It listens to your words, guesses what you mean, and answers. It is a helper tool, not a person.

clues.title: Why this video?
clues.body: A video app or a music app can show you a list of things to watch or hear next. AI made that list. It looked at what you liked before and guessed what you might like now.

clues.title: Typing help
clues.body: When you type and the phone guesses your next word, that is AI too. It saw that words often go together. So it guesses the word it thinks comes next. Sometimes its guess is wrong.

clues.title: Finding the dog
clues.body: A photo app can find every picture with a dog in it. AI learned what dogs look like from many pictures. Then it guesses which of your photos have a dog. It can miss some or guess wrong.

clues.title: You choose
clues.body: AI can guess and suggest, but you are still in charge. You pick what to watch. You choose what to type. AI is a tool that helps you, not a boss that tells you what to do.

clues.title: A fun fact
clues.body: Some dinosaurs were as long as three school buses in a row. That is a cool fact — but it will not help you open any lock.

locks.title: Spot the AI
locks.q: Which one uses AI to make a guess for you?
options: A voice assistant that hears your words and answers you
A wooden pencil that you use to write on paper
A paper map you fold up and put in your bag
locks.reason: A voice assistant uses AI to guess what your words mean and answer you. A plain pencil and a paper map are simple tools with no AI inside.

locks.title: AI All Around You
locks.q: Check EVERY thing where AI is helping by making guesses.

items.t: A video app guesses what you might want to watch next
A phone guesses the next word as you type
A photo app guesses which pictures have a dog in them
A light turns on only because you flip the switch yourself
A crayon colors the paper only where your hand moves it

locks.reason: Video lists, next-word typing, and photo tagging all use AI to make guesses from patterns. A light switch and a crayon just do exactly what your hand does, with no guessing.

locks.title: Not a Person
locks.q: A voice assistant answers you, but it is not alive. It is a computer ______.
locks.reason: A voice assistant is a computer tool, or helper. It can answer you, but it is not a living person and does not think or feel like you do.

locks.title: You Are In Charge
locks.q: A video app suggests a show. Tap the steps in the RIGHT order.

pads.e: 🤖 AI guesses a show for you

locks.reason: First the AI GUESSES a show from your patterns. Then you LOOK at what it suggested. Then YOU CHOOSE what to do, because you are still the boss.
